title: Way More Everything (i lost the file)
description: this mod has been remade under the new name: "Unlimited Craft" (Curseforge + Modrinth)
body:
> **_READ DESC; NOT EVERYTHING IS FINAL!_**

(note: literally anywhere else i could put larger text.. :///) 
**_Most of the stuff ARE subject to change. (Example: Removal of Carpet -> String)_**

> _(Before we get to talking about the REAL stuff [features], we will have a talk about the ADVERTISEMENT!)_

 
Have YOU! (yes YOU) ever gotten bored of only having netherite?! Well, WORRY NO LONGER! I've got you covered. This mod adds (currently 2 but) a bit more than that. (spoiler: its stronger). Do you still to this day miss the notch apple recipe? Well, In this mod; IT'S BACK! Go ahead, craft a dozen.
 
 
**You're ONLY limited to the 3x3 grid of the crafting table.**

More features include:

    Salvaging already existing gear (example: Iron leggings -> 6 Iron Ingots)
    Crafting chainmail
    Returning amethyst blocks to shards
    Crafting DEBUG STICK

And aLOT more to come. :} 
> **_IMPORTANT: To unlock all the recipes: Type '/granteverything' in the chat._**
